issue_title: [BUG] Back button not centered & missing click sound on legal pages
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the bug

On the legal pages (Terms of Service, Privacy, and Security), the back button is not being centered visually in the UI. Additionally, this button does not play a UI click feedback sound effect the way other interactive elements in the app do.

Please fix the centering of the ba
test_description_zh: 访问法律相关页面（服务条款、隐私政策、安全页面），观察返回按钮的水平居中对齐情况，并点击返回按钮，注意是否有 UI 点击音效反馈。
expected_result_zh: 返回按钮在页面中水平居中显示，点击返回按钮时播放与应用中其他交互元素一致的点击音效。
